## Community Profile Submission

**Folder:** `community/<your-github-handle>-<descriptive-name>/`

### Checklist

- [ ] Created folder: `community/<handle>-<name>/`
- [ ] Added `profiles.toml` — output of `am export -p <profile>` or `am export --all`
- [ ] Added `README.md` with frontmatter (copy from `community/TEMPLATE.md`)
- [ ] Frontmatter has: `author`, `description`, `category`, `tags`, `shell`, `profiles`
- [ ] README explains what the aliases do and how to use them
- [ ] Only added/modified files in my own `community/<handle>-<name>/` folder
- [ ] Tested import works: `cat profiles.toml | am import --yes`

<!-- A brief description for reviewers -->
